title: Simplemoney
description: This is a simple money mod. With this mod you can craft your own currency and trade with it.
body:
# 💰 SimpleMoney
**(Mod ID: `simplemoney`)**

![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b69876c2b04f4296ea0189f56919edb57b67a8e.png)

**SimpleMoney** bridges the gap between resource gathering and a high-tier economy. Forget Emeralds—the **Money Bill** is the new standard for wealth. You can't just farm it; you must craft it, find it, or earn it.

### [📚 Read the Full Documentation & Crafting Recipes](https://github.com/Ouzzi/simplemoney)

---

## ✨ Features at a Glance

* **🏭 Complex Economy:** Money isn't free. Creating a bill is an industrial process involving rare materials, Smithing Tables, and Blast Furnaces.
* **⚖️ Better Villagers:** Trading is now based on a weighted probability system. Rare enchants like **Mending** are harder to find but guaranteed at specific levels.
* **🕵️ Black Market:** The Wandering Trader is finally useful! He now sells non-renewable items like **Netherite Scrap** and **Shulker Shells**.
* **🌍 Exploration Loot:** Money Bills have been injected into Shipwrecks, Strongholds, and Buried Treasure.

---

## 🛠️ The Production Chain
Creating currency requires chemistry, precision, and heat. From **Special Paper** to **Blast Furnace Curing**, every Money Bill is a crafted masterpiece.

![Production Chain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd50a185ed5f1cb8a7584fd20430588ece071766.png)

*(See the [Wiki](https://github.com/Ouzzi/simplemoney) for the exact recipes)*

---

## ⚙️ Configuration
Balanced for SMPs and Modpacks. Requires **Cloth Config API**.

* **🔧 Toggle Features:** Enable/Disable custom trades or the Wandering Trader overhaul.

---

## 📥 Dependencies
* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (Required)
* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (Required)
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Recommended for in-game config)
